entry.title: Optimizing MiniMax M3 Sparse Attention on NVIDIA Blackwell
entry.summary: Sparse attention should be cheaper than dense, but M3's data-dependent block selection usually eats the savings. The Fireworks Performance team wrote a KV-stationary kernel for NVIDIA Blackwell that loads each selected KV block once and keeps tensor cores at full 128×128 tiles: ~980 TFLOP/s, 1.9–2.4
entry.content: Sparse attention should be cheaper than dense, but M3's data-dependent block selection usually eats the savings. The Fireworks Performance team wrote a KV-stationary kernel for NVIDIA Blackwell that loads each selected KV block once and keeps tensor cores at full 128×128 tiles: ~980 TFLOP/s, 1.9–2.4× a query-stationary baseline and ~1.6× open-source MSA.

entry.title: How Gumloop Scaled Open-Weight Model Usage 7x in 3 Weeks with Fireworks AI
entry.summary: Gumloop scaled its open-weight model usage 7x in three weeks by partnering with Fireworks AI. By optimizing its agent harness and switching to models like GLM-5.2, Gumloop achieved up to 72% cost savings while maintaining production-level quality and reliability, proving that open-weight models are
entry.content: Gumloop scaled its open-weight model usage 7x in three weeks by partnering with Fireworks AI. By optimizing its agent harness and switching to models like GLM-5.2, Gumloop achieved up to 72% cost savings while maintaining production-level quality and reliability, proving that open-weight models are now viable for complex, real-world AI workloads.

entry.title: Open, frontier, and yours: LangChain Deep Agents on NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra, running on Fireworks
entry.summary: What’s New? LangChain has tuned its Deep Agents harness for NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra, achieving benchmark-leading agent performance among open models at 10x lower cost of closed alternatives. That tuned harness ships inside Langchain Deep Agents, and Nemotron 3 Ultra runs on Fireworks with day-zero s
entry.content: What’s New? LangChain has tuned its Deep Agents harness for NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra, achieving benchmark-leading agent performance among open models at 10x lower cost of closed alternatives. That tuned harness ships inside Langchain Deep Agents, and Nemotron 3 Ultra runs on Fireworks with day-zero support.

entry.title: Using GLM 5.2 Fast to deliver one engineer-month in just four days and $218 of tokens
entry.summary: I scoped this GPU capacity management feature at a full engineer-month. On GLM 5.2 Fast through FireConnect and Claude Code, it took four days and $218: four PRs, ~3,000 lines, 34 tests passing, CI green. Here's the workflow, and why fast open models are quietly changing how senior engineers work.
entry.content: I scoped this GPU capacity management feature at a full engineer-month. On GLM 5.2 Fast through FireConnect and Claude Code, it took four days and $218: four PRs, ~3,000 lines, 34 tests passing, CI green. Here's the workflow, and why fast open models are quietly changing how senior engineers work.

entry.title: GLM 5.2 Fast is live on Fireworks
entry.summary: GLM 5.2 Fast is live on Fireworks today. Across multiple 3rd party benchmarks, Fireworks consistently delivers the fastest throughput among all API inference providers. ~2x our own Standard path, on shared serverless endpoint, available for everyone, with no reserved GPUs.
entry.content: GLM 5.2 Fast is live on Fireworks today. Across multiple 3rd party benchmarks, Fireworks consistently delivers the fastest throughput among all API inference providers. ~2x our own Standard path, on shared serverless endpoint, available for everyone, with no reserved GPUs.

entry.title: Cursor Composer 2 + Fireworks AI
entry.summary: Cursor built a coding model optimized for software engineering by combining continual pre-training, reinforcement learning, and production feedback.
entry.content: Cursor built a coding model optimized for software engineering by combining continual pre-training, reinforcement learning, and production feedback.

entry.title: How Factory Grew Open Model Usage 2-3x in Six Months on Fireworks
entry.summary: Factory is proving that agentic software development only works at scale when teams can swap models instantly without breaking production. By standardizing on Fireworks AI for day-zero open model access and consistent performance, they cut costs to 6–20% of frontier levels while keeping their “Droid
entry.content: Factory is proving that agentic software development only works at scale when teams can swap models instantly without breaking production. By standardizing on Fireworks AI for day-zero open model access and consistent performance, they cut costs to 6–20% of frontier levels while keeping their “Droids” reliable as new models ship

entry.title: Frontier AI at a fraction of the cost: open-source workers with a closed-source advisor
entry.summary: This latest research memo introduces a "worker-advisor" architecture that pairs efficient open-source models with a single, skeptical "frontier" advisor. The simple setup consistently beats a closed-source only model across coding, terminal, and legal tasks, at a fraction of the cost. Explore the de
entry.content: This latest research memo introduces a "worker-advisor" architecture that pairs efficient open-source models with a single, skeptical "frontier" advisor. The simple setup consistently beats a closed-source only model across coding, terminal, and legal tasks, at a fraction of the cost. Explore the details by checking out our open-source cookbook today.

entry.title: Frontier-lab Training Infrastructure, Available Now as a Managed Service for GLM 5.2
entry.summary: The infrastructure that makes reinforcement learning converge on a frontier model has always been locked inside the top labs. Batch invariance, zero-KLD train/serve alignment, and fast RL rollouts are now available as a managed service on Fireworks, starting with GLM 5.2.
entry.content: The infrastructure that makes reinforcement learning converge on a frontier model has always been locked inside the top labs. Batch invariance, zero-KLD train/serve alignment, and fast RL rollouts are now available as a managed service on Fireworks, starting with GLM 5.2.

entry.title: GLM 5.2 is live on Fireworks inference, day zero.
entry.summary: GLM 5.2 is live on Fireworks inference, day zero.

entry.title: Fireworks is moving to prepaid billing on July 1st
entry.summary: Fireworks is moving to prepaid billing on July 1st

entry.title: Kimi K2.7 Code on Fireworks: Better Agents, Lower Cost per Task, Available Day-0
entry.summary: Fireworks is live with day-0 support for Kimi K2.7 Code, the latest model in the frontier K2 series of models by Moonshot AI. Optimized for agentic coding, it delivers higher benchmark scores while using 30% fewer reasoning tokens. This efficiency means faster, more cost-effective workflows for your
entry.content: Fireworks is live with day-0 support for Kimi K2.7 Code, the latest model in the frontier K2 series of models by Moonshot AI. Optimized for agentic coding, it delivers higher benchmark scores while using 30% fewer reasoning tokens. This efficiency means faster, more cost-effective workflows for your coding tasks. Start integrating Kimi K2.7 Code on the Fireworks platform today.

entry.title: MiniMax M3 is live: long context + native multimodality at 1/20th the price
entry.summary: MiniMax M3 is live on Fireworks, and it transforms what open-weight models can be used to accomplish. One model. One million tokens of context. Frontier coding that runs autonomously for hours. Native image and video understanding. And the fastest M3 inference available, anywhere. Whether you're bui
entry.content: MiniMax M3 is live on Fireworks, and it transforms what open-weight models can be used to accomplish. One model. One million tokens of context. Frontier coding that runs autonomously for hours. Native image and video understanding. And the fastest M3 inference available, anywhere. Whether you're building long-horizon agents, multimodal pipelines, or full-repo coding workflows, M3 on Fireworks is ready for production. Start building today.

entry.title: Qwen 3.7 Plus on Fireworks: Run it today.
entry.summary: Experience the raw power of Qwen 3.7 Plus directly on Fireworks, the world’s leading high-performance inference provider. While others offer simple API routing, Fireworks delivers genuine, independent infrastructure for Alibaba’s flagship frontier model. By leveraging our proprietary FireAttention e
entry.content: Experience the raw power of Qwen 3.7 Plus directly on Fireworks, the world’s leading high-performance inference provider. While others offer simple API routing, Fireworks delivers genuine, independent infrastructure for Alibaba’s flagship frontier model. By leveraging our proprietary FireAttention engine—optimized with mxfp8 quantization and MoE-specific kernels—we extract the maximum tokens per second at the lowest possible latency, ensuring your production workloads remain fast, reliable, and secure.

entry.title: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra is live on Fireworks, day zero
entry.summary: Run NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra today. Optimize autonomous agents with 1M context and frontier reasoning. Day-zero support on the fastest infrastructure.
entry.content: Run NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra today. Optimize autonomous agents with 1M context and frontier reasoning. Day-zero support on the fastest infrastructure.

entry.title: How Harvey & Fireworks Beat Closed Source on Cost + Quality
entry.summary: Combining an open-source agent harness, frontier tool use, and Fireworks-native post-training lifts performance through system-level orchestration.
entry.content: Combining an open-source agent harness, frontier tool use, and Fireworks-native post-training lifts performance through system-level orchestration.

entry.title: Trilogy Validates Open-Weight AI Models for Enterprise AI Workloads with Fireworks
entry.summary: Trilogy’s AI Center of Excellence evaluated open-weight models as rising inference costs and operational constraints limited scalable deployment across enterprise AI workloads. Fireworks AI provided a unified inference layer for evaluation and early production testing, enabling validation of open-we
entry.content: Trilogy’s AI Center of Excellence evaluated open-weight models as rising inference costs and operational constraints limited scalable deployment across enterprise AI workloads. Fireworks AI provided a unified inference layer for evaluation and early production testing, enabling validation of open-weight models under enterprise-scale latency, cost, and throughput requirements.

entry.title: Agents Don't Fail on Intelligence. They Fail on Execution.
entry.summary: Agents Don't Fail on Intelligence. They Fail on Execution.

entry.title: Innovative Solutions Rebuilds Enterprise Services Delivery with Fireworks AI
entry.summary: By powering DarcyIQ with Fireworks, Innovative Solutions transformed AI inference from a linear cost center into a predictable scaling layer for multi-agent services delivery, enabling faster cycles, higher throughput, and stable economics at billions of tokens per month.
entry.content: By powering DarcyIQ with Fireworks, Innovative Solutions transformed AI inference from a linear cost center into a predictable scaling layer for multi-agent services delivery, enabling faster cycles, higher throughput, and stable economics at billions of tokens per month.

entry.title: Frontier RL Is Cheaper Than You Think
entry.summary: The conventional wisdom on RL infrastructure is wrong. Cross-region rollouts, compact deltas, and hot-load updates let teams use distributed capacity effectively instead of waiting for one mega cluster.
entry.content: The conventional wisdom on RL infrastructure is wrong. Cross-region rollouts, compact deltas, and hot-load updates let teams use distributed capacity effectively instead of waiting for one mega cluster.

entry.title: DPO, your simplest RL pipeline with two rollouts
entry.summary: DPO (Direct Preference Optimization) and GRPO (Group Relative Policy Optimization) are both powerful LLM fine-tuning techniques that allow models to be tuned towards generating better responses. While GRPO is a Reinforcement Learning algorithm that requires much more setup, DPO is usually much easie
entry.content: DPO (Direct Preference Optimization) and GRPO (Group Relative Policy Optimization) are both powerful LLM fine-tuning techniques that allow models to be tuned towards generating better responses. While GRPO is a Reinforcement Learning algorithm that requires much more setup, DPO is usually much easier to experiment with. So how feasible is it to build an RL-like training pipeline with just DPO?

entry.title: Self-Improving Agents, Powered by Your Evals
entry.summary: Eval Protocol is a unified eval interface that powers both prompt optimization and RL on the same evaluation function. Author your evaluator once, and instantly unlock huge gains on open-source models.
entry.content: Eval Protocol is a unified eval interface that powers both prompt optimization and RL on the same evaluation function. Author your evaluator once, and instantly unlock huge gains on open-source models.
